V.rationale: Visa's best-in-class margins and sequential revenue growth, combined with a recovering share price and broadly positive analyst sentiment, make it mildly attractive on a one-year horizon despite macro uncertainty and the absence of explicit valuation data.

Positive analyst/news sentiment: multiple outlets naming V a top stock for 2023 and a 'safest stock' pick

BA.rationale: Boeing's deeply impaired fundamentals — negative equity, negative gross margins, and continuing massive losses — outweigh the speculative recovery rally that has already pushed the stock up 51% in three months.
key_factors: Negative gross margin of -1.4% and operating margin of -12% in latest ratios (2022-12-30) indicate Boeing is losing money on production before overhead
Total equity of -$17.64B with total debt of $57.02B vs cash of $14.30B (Q3 2022 filing) — balance sheet is deeply impaired
Stock has already rallied +51.1% in 3 months to $190.49, limiting near-term upside while fundamentals remain broken
Q3 2022 EPS of -$5.49 reversed a brief Q2 profit of $0.32, showing no consistent path to profitability
